name: accountable-agent-runtime
description: Reference accountable-agent runtime: composes solid-agent-card + solid-a2a + solid-odrl (agent-delegation profile) + solid-vc + the agent-authz credential note into the Accountable Web of Agents vision paper's §4 worked scenario, made executable. Phase 0 SHIPPED — the whole flow runs as a deterministic, golden-master-tested script over test doubles with REAL crypto; exports the composed four-phase chain verifier (G7 + the D9 identity-composition rule), the trace writer/reader (the auditor's mechanical walk), and the scripted scenario. Tracks the M1–M4 API gap list (G1–G15).
